channel.title: HoldLens — What to sell (Q4 2025)
channel.description: Top sell signals from the best portfolio managers in the world — ranked on a single signed −100..+100 ConvictionScore where −100 is the strongest possible sell. Updated every 13F filing deadline.

item.title: AAPL SELL signal · score −25 on a −100..+100 scale
item.description: John Armitage, Warren Buffett, Polen Capital, David Rolfe, Tom Slater are selling AAPL (Apple Inc.) this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: −25 (negative = sell, positive = buy). Quality-weighted seller list: John Armitage (Q4.9), Warren Buffett (Q5.9), Polen Capital (Q5.6), David Rolfe (Q4.8), Tom Slater (Q4.8).

item.title: GOOGL SELL signal · score −21 on a −100..+100 scale
item.description: Glenn Greenberg, Terry Smith, Polen Capital, Bill Ackman, David Rolfe, Bill Nygren are selling GOOGL (Alphabet) this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: −21 (negative = sell, positive = buy). Quality-weighted seller list: Glenn Greenberg (Q6.2), Terry Smith (Q5.8), Polen Capital (Q5.6), Bill Ackman (Q5.1), David Rolfe (Q4.8), Bill Nygren (Q4.5).

item.title: POOL SELL signal · score −10 on a −100..+100 scale
item.description: David Rolfe, Warren Buffett, Joel Greenblatt are selling POOL (POOL) this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: −10 (negative = sell, positive = buy). Quality-weighted seller list: David Rolfe (Q4.8), Warren Buffett (Q5.9), Joel Greenblatt (Q2.2).

item.description: FIS (Fidelity National Info) carries a strong historical sell signal even without fresh activity this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: −3 (negative = sell, positive = buy). Score reflects historical dissent, crowding, and trend deterioration.
